ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle (e.g., Tesla) */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle (e.g., Model S) */,
  "variant" TEXT /* Variant of the vehicle (e.g., Electric Hatchback) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the vehicle (e.g., 60.0, 60D AWD) */,
  "engine" TEXT /* Engine details of the vehicle (e.g., — 225KW 306HP L1S) */,
  "chassis" TEXT /* Chassis details of the vehicle (e.g., RWD 5YJS) */,
  "production_year" TEXT /* Production year of the vehicle (e.g., 2013-2014) */,
  "battery_capacity" REAL /* Battery capacity in kWh */,
  "range_miles" INTEGER /* Range of the vehicle in miles */,
  "top_speed_mph" INTEGER /* Top speed of the vehicle in mph */,
  "acceleration_0_60" REAL /* Time it takes for the vehicle to accelerate from 0 to 60 mph */,
  "production_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of production */,
  "production_end_date" TEXT /* End date of production */,
  "sales_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of sales */,
  "sales_end_date" TEXT /* End date of sales */,
  "msrp" REAL /* Manufacturer's suggested retail price */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the vehicle */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engines" (
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engine */,
  "engine_name" TEXT /* Name of the engine */,
  "power_kw" INTEGER /* Power of the engine in kW */,
  "power_hp" INTEGER /* Power of the engine in HP */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the engine */,
  "torque_nm" INTEGER /* Torque of the engine in Newton-meters */,
  "battery_type" TEXT /* Type of battery used (e.g., Lithium-ion, Nickel-Cadmium) */,
  "battery_capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the battery in kWh */,
  "battery_weight_kg" REAL /* Weight of the battery in kilograms */,
  "cooling_system" TEXT /* Type of cooling system used (e.g., Air, Liquid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chassis" (
  "chassis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chassis */,
  "chassis_name" TEXT /* Name of the chassis */,
  "drive_type" TEXT /* Drive type of the chassis (e.g., RWD, AWD) */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the chassis */,
  "wheelbase_mm" INTEGER /* Wheelbase of the chassis in millimeters */,
  "track_width_mm" INTEGER /* Track width of the chassis in millimeters */,
  "body_type" TEXT /* Body type of the chassis (e.g., Sedan, Hatchback) */,
  "seating_capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the chassis */,
  "cargo_capacity_liters" INTEGER /* Cargo capacity of the chassis in liters */,
  "curb_weight_kg" REAL /* Curb weight of the chassis in kilograms */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chassis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_engine_chassis" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the engine used in the vehicle */,
  "chassis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chassis used in the vehicle */,
  "configuration_description" TEXT /* Description of the specific configuration of the vehicle with the given engine and chassis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id", "engine_id", "chassis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of vehicles sold */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price at which the vehicle was sold */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Sales, Marketing, Engineering) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing the permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
